echo-desc: Nidaam lagu ogeysiiyo isticmaaleyaasha dhacdooyinka iyo farriimaha
prefs-description-echo: Dooro ogeysiisyada {{GENDER:|aad}} hesho iyo sida laguugu soo gaarsiiyo.
prefs-echosubscriptions: Iisoo dir arrimaha ku saabsan dhacdooyinkaan
prefs-mutedpageslist: Bogagga la aamusiyay ee ogeysiisyada xiriirinta bogga
echo-pref-show-poll-updates: Muuji ogeysiisyada cusub marka ay soo galaan
echo-pref-show-poll-updates-help: Muuji tirada ogeysiisyada aan la akhrin ee ku jirta baarka cinwaanka, sidoo kalena muuji qayb kooban oo ogeysiis kasta ah isla marka uu soo galo.
echo-pref-email-frequency-never: Waxba ha iiga soo dirin ku saabsan wargelinnada e-mailka
echo-pref-email-frequency-immediately: Wargelinnada kalida ah ee marka ay soo dhacaan.
echo-pref-cross-wiki-notifications: Muuji ogeysiisyada ka imanaya wiki-yada kale
echo-pref-dont-email-read-notifications: Ha ku darin ogeysiisyada la akhriyay iimaylada soo koobidda
echo-new-messages: Waxaad haysataa fariin cusub oo bogga wadahadalka ah
echo-category-title-edit-user-talk: {{PLURAL:$1|Wax ka beddel|Wax ka beddello}} bogga wadahadalkeyga
echo-category-title-edit-user-page: {{PLURAL:$1|Wax ka beddel|Wax ka beddello}} bogga isticmaalahayga
echo-category-title-emailuser: {{PLURAL:$1|Iimayl ka yimid isticmaale kale|Iimayllo ka yimid isticmaaleyaasha kale}}
echo-category-title-watchlist: Wax ka beddel bogga liiska la socodka
echo-category-title-minor-watchlist: Wax ka beddel yar oo ku saabsan bogga la socodka
echo-pref-tooltip-article-linked: I ogeysii marka qof ka sameeyo xiriir bog kale oo u jeeda bog aan abuuray.
echo-pref-tooltip-reverted: I ogeysii marka qof ka laabto wax ka beddel aan sameeyay, isagoo isticmaalaya qalabka ka noqoshada ama dib u celinta.
echo-pref-tooltip-mention: I ogeysii marka qof ku xiro boggayga isticmaale.
echo-pref-tooltip-mention-failure: I ogeysii marka aanan awoodin inaan qof u diro xus.
echo-pref-tooltip-mention-success: I ogeysii marka aan qof u diro xus.
echo-pref-tooltip-article-reminder: I ogeysii boggan marka aan codsado.
echo-pref-tooltip-thank-you-edit: I ogeysii marka aan gaaro wax ka beddelkeyga 1aad, 10aad, 100aad...
echo-pref-tooltip-watchlist: I ogeysii marka qof wax ka beddel (aan yarayn) ku sameeyo bog ku jira liiska aan la socdo.
echo-pref-tooltip-minor-watchlist: I ogeysii marka qof wax ka beddel yar ku sameeyo bog ku jira liiska aan la socdo.
echo-pref-tooltip-api-triggered: I soo dir ogeysiisyo ay kiciyaan bots ama qalab iyada oo loo marayo API.
echo-displaynotificationsconfiguration-s: Tani waa dulmar ku saabsan sida ogeysiisyada loogu habeeyay wiki-kan.
Qaybta lagu kala saarayo nooc kasta oo ogeysiis ah
echo-displaynotificationsconfiguration-a: Hababka ogeysiiska ee la oggol yahay
Hababka ogeysiiska ee lagu taageero qayb kasta
echo-displaynotificationsconfiguration-m: Hababka ogeysiiska ee loo baahan yahay
Hababka ogeysiiska ee waajibka ku ah qayb kasta
echo-specialpage-section-markread: U calaamadee kooxda sidii la akhriyay
echo-specialpage-pagefilterwidget-aria-l: Ku shaandhee wiki iyo cinwaanka bogga
echo-specialpage-special-help-menu-widge: Xulashooyin dheeraad ah iyo dejinta ogeysiisyada
echo-specialpage-pagefilters-subtitle: Bogag leh wargelinno ee aan la aqrin
echo-api-failure: Waa lagu guul darraystay in la soo qaato ogeysiisyada.
echo-api-failure-cross-wiki: Gelitaanka domain-ka fog waa la diiday.
echo-notification-placeholder-filters: Ma jiraan wargelinno isleh ee xulshadaan kooban
echo-notification-popup-loginrequired: Fadlan soo gal si aad u aragto ogeysiisyadaada.
notification-dynamic-actions-mute-page-l: Ogeysiisyada "xiriirinta bogga" hadda waa laga damiyay bogga "$1"
{{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} maamuli kartaa bogagga aad aamustay [$1 dooqyadaada] wakhti kasta.
notification-dynamic-actions-unmute-page: Ogeysiisyada "xiriirinta bogga" hadda waa la hawlgeliyay bogga "$1"
{{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} maamuli kartaa bogagga aad aamustay [$1 dooqyadaada] wakhti kasta.
notification-dynamic-actions-unwatch-con: {{GENDER:$3|Waxaad}} wakhti kasta la socon kartaa [$2 boggan].
notification-dynamic-actions-watch-confi: {{GENDER:$3|Waxaad}} wakhti kasta joojin kartaa la socoshada [$2 boggan].
notification-bundle-header-page-linked: Xiriirro ayaa laga sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5||$5 bog|100=99+ bog}} ilaa $3.
notification-header-article-reminder: Bog aad {{GENDER:$2|codsatay}} in lagu xusuusiyo wuxuu ku yaal $3.
notification-header-mention-agent-talkpa: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ayaa ku xusay}} {{GENDER:$3|adiga}} {{GENDER:$2|boggiisa wada hadalka|boggeeda wada hadalka|boggooda wada hadalka}}.
notification-header-mention-failure-user: Laguma diri karo {{GENDER:$2|xuskaaga}} ee $3 sababtoo ah akoon magacan leh ma jiro.
Laguma diri karo {{GENDER:$2|xuskaaga}} ee $3 sababtoo ah qofka waa aan la aqoon.
notification-header-mention-failure-too-: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} isku dayday inaad xusto in ka badan $3 {{PLURAL:$3|isticmaale|isticmaaleyaal}}. Dhammaan xusyada ka sarreeya xadkaas lama dirin.
notification-header-mention-failure-bund: {{PLURAL:$3|Xus|$3 xuso}} {{GENDER:$2|aad samaysay}} ee $4 bogga wadahadalka {{PLURAL:$3|lama dirin}}.
notification-header-mention-success-bund: {{PLURAL:$3|Xus|$3 xuso}} {{GENDER:$2|aad samaysay}} ee $4 bogga wadahadalka {{PLURAL:$3|waa la diray}}.
notification-header-mention-status-bundl: {{PLURAL:$3|Ogeysiis|$3 ogeysiisyo}} ku saabsan xusyada {{GENDER:$2|aad samaysay}} ee $4 bogga wadahadalka: {{PLURAL:$5|$5 lama dirin}}, {{PLURAL:$6|$6 waa la diray}}.
notification-header-user-rights-add-only: {{GENDER:$4|Xuquuqda isticmaalahaaga}} waa la {{GENDER:$1|beddelay}}. Waxaa lagugu daray: $2.
notification-header-user-rights-remove-o: {{GENDER:$4|Xuquuqda isticmaalahaaga}} waa la {{GENDER:$1|beddelay}}. Hadda kama mid tihid: $2.
notification-header-user-rights-add-and-: {{GENDER:$6|Xuquuqda isticmaalahaaga}} waa la {{GENDER:$1|beddelay}}. Waxaa lagugu daray: $2. Hadda kama mid tihid: $4.
notification-header-user-rights-expiry-c: {{GENDER:$4|Muddada dhicitaanka xubinnimadaada}} ee {{PLURAL:$3|kooxda soo socota|kooxaha soo socda}} waa la {{GENDER:$1|beddelay}}: $2.
notification-header-welcome: {{GENDER:$2|Ku soo dhawoow}} {{SITENAME}}, $1! Waan ku faraxsanahay {{GENDER:$2|inaad halkan joogto}}.
notification-header-mention-summary: $1 {{GENDER:$2|ku xusay}} {{GENDER:$3|adiga}} faallo wax ka beddelka ee $4.
notification-header-watchlist-changed: $1 {{GENDER:$2|beddelay}} $3, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$4|liiskaaga la socoshada}} {{PLURAL:$5||, $5 jeer}}.
notification-header-watchlist-created: $1 {{GENDER:$2|abuuray}} $3, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$4|liiskaaga la socoshada}} {{PLURAL:$5||, $5 jeer}}.
notification-header-watchlist-deleted: $1 {{GENDER:$2|tirtiray}} $3, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$4|liiskaaga la socoshada}}{{PLURAL:$5||, $5 jeer}}.
notification-header-watchlist-moved: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wareejiyay}} $3, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$4|liiskaaga la socoshada}}{{PLURAL:$5||, $5 jeer}}.
notification-header-watchlist-restored: $1 {{GENDER:$2|soo celiyay}} $3, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$4|liiskaaga la socoshada}}{{PLURAL:$5||, $5 jeer}}.
notification-header-watchlist-multiuser-: $1, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$2|liiskaaga la socoshada}} oo la beddelay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|jeer|jeero}}.
$1, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$2|liiskaaga la socoshada}} ayaa la abuuray $3 {{PLURAL:$3|jeer|jeero}}.
$1, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$2|liiskaaga la socoshada}} ayaa la tirtiray $3 {{PLURAL:$3|jeer|jeero}}.
$1, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$2|liiskaaga la socoshada}} ayaa la wareejiyay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|jeer|jeero}}.
$1, bog ku jira {{GENDER:$2|liiskaaga la socoshada}} ayaa la soo celiyay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|jeer|jeero}}.
notification-body-watchlist-once: Ogeysiisyo iimayl oo kale lama diri doono haddii ay dhacdo hawl dheeraad ah, ilaa {{GENDER:$1|aad booqato}} boggan adigoo soo galay.
notification-header-thank-you-1-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} hadda sameysay wax ka beddelkaagii ugu horreeyay; mahadsanid {{GENDER:$2|adiga}}, soo dhawoow!
notification-header-thank-you-10-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} hadda samaysay wax ka beddelkaaga tobnaad; mahadsanid {{GENDER:$2|adiga}}, fadlan sii wad!
notification-header-thank-you-100-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad|}} hadda samaysay {{GENDER:$2|wax ka beddelkaaga boqolaad}}; {{GENDER:$2|waad}} ku mahadsan tahay!
notification-header-thank-you-1000-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad|}} hadda samaysay {{GENDER:$2|wax ka beddelkaaga kunaad}}; {{GENDER:$2|waad}} ku mahadsan tahay inaad noqotay ka qaybqaate wanaagsan!
notification-header-thank-you-10000-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} hadda samaysay {{GENDER:$2|wax ka beddelkaaga tobanka kun ee jeer}}; {{GENDER:$2|waad}} ku mahadsan tahay aad iyo aad!
notification-header-thank-you-10000000-e: {{GENDER:$2|Waxaad}} hadda samaysay {{GENDER:$2|wax ka beddelkaaga}} toban milyan ee jeer; {{GENDER:$2|aad baad}} ugu mahadsan tahay wax ku biirintaada cajiibka ah!
notification-header-reverted: {{PLURAL:$4|Wax ka beddelka ee $3|Wax ka beddello ee $3}} {{GENDER:$2|waa la celiyay}}.
notification-reverted-email-subject2: {{GENDER:$3|Wax ka beddelkaaga}} {{PLURAL:$4|waa la celiye|waa la celiyay}} {{GENDER:$2|ee}} {{SITENAME}}
echo-email-plain-footer: Si aad u maamusho iimayllada aan kuu soo dirno {{GENDER:$1|adiga}}, hubi {{GENDER:$1|dookhyadaada}}:
echo-email-html-footer-with-link: Si aad u maamusho iimayllada aan kuu soo dirno {{GENDER:$2|adiga}}, $1.
echo-mark-all-as-read-confirmation: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|ogeysiis|ogeysiisyo}} ayaa loo calaamadeeyay sidii la akhriyey
echo-mark-wiki-as-read: Calaamadee {{PLURAL:$2|dhammaan}} sidii la akhriyey wiki-ga la xushay: $1
notification-bundle-header-edit-user-pag: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal wax ka beddel cusub|$1 wax ka beddello cusub|100=99+ wax ka beddello cusub}} oo ku saabsan {{GENDER:$2|boggaaga isticmaalaha}}.
notification-bundle-header-edit-user-tal: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal fariin cusub|$1 fariimo cusub|100=99+ fariimo cusub}} oo ku jira {{GENDER:$3|boggaaga wadahadalka}}.

Salaan $1,
Halkan waxaa ku yaal soo koobidda hawlihii maanta ee {{SITENAME}} adiga.
echo-email-batch-body-intro-weekly:
Salaan $1,

notification-header-foreign-notice: Ogeysiisyo dheeraad ah oo ka yimid {{PLURAL:$5|wiki kale|$5 wiki oo kale}}
